value.heading: A House Divided Against Itself Makes No Soup
value.subheading:
We're a community food organization in Saint Louis. We cook for our neighbors and support partner organizations doing good work across the city. We're building toward a gathering place of our own where good food is always within reach.
We started Soup House because we believe people are better at taking care of each other than the world gives them credit for. Good food doesn't require profit. Meals made and eaten together are the root of what brings us together. A neighborhood gets stronger when its people figure things out side by side.
